name: finance_blueprint
description: Standard schema for banking, loans, and financial transactions.

schema.transaction_amount: number (generic amount for a payment, transfer, or withdrawal)
schema.account_age_days: number (days since the account was opened)
schema.beneficiary_account_age_days: number (days since the beneficiary account was first seen or opened)
schema.transfer_count_24h: number (number of outgoing transfers in the last 24 hours)
schema.total_transfer_amount_24h: number (sum of outgoing transfer amounts in the last 24 hours)
